path.style: fill: rgb(204, 204, 204); visibility: visible; fill-opacity: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: fill 0.2s ease-in-out; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; paint-order: stroke; stroke-width: 12px;
